title: Product Marketing Executive (Regional, Consumer IT Products)
description:
• Work closely with regional sales companies to achieve sales targets and business objectives

  • Monitor regional sell-in, sell-out, and sell-through performance to ensure healthy sales and inventory levels

  • Track market activities, market share, and competitor movements to identify opportunities and risks

  • Conduct market research and analyse consumer and technology trends to support sound business decisions

  • Understand consumer needs and behaviour to identify suitable products and services for different segments

  • Influence overall product roadmap through market insights and analysis

  • Lead new product launches, including product positioning, pricing strategy, product training, and market communication to end-users

  • Plan and execute marketing and support activities with clear return on investment

  • Manage the full product lifecycle from pre-launch to end-of-life

  • Develop and adapt pricing strategies based on internal considerations and external market trends

  • Formulate and execute go-to-market strategies to support regional sales performance

Requirements:

  • Degree in Marketing, Business, or related disciplines

  • Strong analytical skills; data-driven and comfortable working with numbers

  • Effective communication skills, including regular presentations and collaboration with regional teams

  • Good problem-solving ability, with experience in research, evaluation, and proposal assessment

  • Well-organised, self-disciplined, and able to manage tasks independently and on time

  • Passion for technology and IT products is an advantage

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com



EA License No.: 13C6305

Reg. No.: R23117344 (Tiong Tian Ho)

For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
